title: Remove references to container restart on create/run command
body:
podman does not support autorestart.  Should use systemd if you
want containers to restart

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/486

comments.body: Note to self: Once we get a Conmon capable of supporting cleanup routines, we can make autoremove work with -d. We need to fix this in the manpages when this happens.
